exploration_notes: The gRPC health check protocol compliance in Envoy is implemented entirely within the grpc health checker extension at source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/. The .cc file contains: (1) the grpc.health.v1.Health.Check service method descriptor lookup in the constructor (line 63-64), (2) HealthCheckRequest construction and sending in onInterval() (lines 232-238), (3) HealthCheckResponse parsing in decodeData() (lines 146-161), (4) response status mapping (SERVING/NOT_SERVING/UNKNOWN/SERVICE_UNKN
